name: The Meridian at River North
description: 34-story mixed-use tower featuring 18000 SF ground-floor retail and restaurant 8 floors Class A office and 22 floors of 210 for-sale residential condominiums. Structural concrete core and post-tensioned slabs. Unitized curtain wall system. LEED Gold target. Located in River North adjacent to CTA Brown Line elevated station.

name: St. Dominic Medical Center Expansion
description: 5-story 180-bed inpatient patient tower addition plus 3-story 60000 SF Medical Office Building connected via enclosed skybridge. Tower includes 4 operating suites ICU PCU and general acute care floors. Design-build MEP critical systems. ICRA infection control requirements throughout construction. FGI Guidelines compliance. Joint Commission survey preparation.

name: Paladin Resort & Casino
description: New 38-story casino resort tower with 620-key hotel 120000 SF gaming floor 8 F&B outlets 2 pools rooftop nightclub 40000 SF meeting and convention space and 1800-space parking structure. Design phase 75% complete. GMP development ongoing. Nevada Gaming Control Board coordination required. TACT (Tribal and Commercial Threshold) compliance. Preconstruction services in progress - GMP target June 2026.

name: Mid-South Logistics Park - Building 2
description: 1.2-million SF Class A cross-dock distribution center with 40-ft clear height 240 dock doors 4 drive-in doors 185-ft truck court ESFR sprinkler system LED lighting with motion sensors and office build-out of 12000 SF. Tilt-up concrete construction. On-site stormwater retention pond. LEED Silver target. Tenant: major e-commerce retailer. Project 97% complete - in final closeout and punchlist phase.

name: Denver Southwest Recreation & Aquatics Center
client_name: City and County of Denver Parks & Recreation
description: Design-build community recreation and aquatics center serving Denver's southwest neighborhoods. 68000 SF facility featuring 50-meter competition pool leisure pool and splash pad fitness center gymnasium and multi-purpose community rooms. Solar PV array and geothermal HVAC system. City of Denver Design-Build procurement. Prevailing wage Colorado Little Davis-Bacon Act. 38% design complete and 22% construction complete.
